content:
守密人：
    近期，我们在数据监控中发现，存在部分异常订单，为通过技术手段非法利用充值平台漏洞、以获取高价值商品的异常情况。对此，运营团队已完成核查并启动相应处理程序。
    针对所有涉及本次异常订单的账号，您将会在本公告发出的72小时内收到邮件通知，我们会采取以下处置措施：
    ● 回收全部通过异常订单获取的商品道具，并封禁账号 3 天；
    ● 若同一账号再次发生类似违规行为，将予以永久封禁，不另行通知。
    ***若您的商品道具已被消耗，不足以扣除，则需要在封禁时间结束后，通过登录界面的客服入口进行申诉，并根据指引完成补充值流程，方可完成解封。
    此外，我们注意到，部分守密人可能通过非官方渠道（如第三方代充）进行充值。在此，我们郑重提示：代充行为存在账号被盗、财产损失等严重风险，官方无法对非官方渠道造成的任何损失提供保障。请守密人通过官方渠道进行充值，以保障您的账号及财产安全！
    感谢守密人对《忘却前夜》的支持！如有任何疑问，欢迎联系官方客服寻求帮助！
 
【涉及异常订单的UID】

Notice on Handling Abnormal Orders and Account Security Risk Warnings

Keeper:
  Recently, we identified a number of anomalous orders through data monitoring — instances where technical means were used to illegally exploit vulnerabilities in the recharge platform in order to obtain high-value items. In response, the operations team has completed its review and initiated the appropriate handling procedures.
For all accounts involved in this abnormal order incident, you will receive an email notification within 72 hours of this announcement. We will take the following actions:
  ● All items obtained through abnormal orders will be reclaimed, and the account will be banned for 3 days;
  ● If the same account commits a similar violation again, it will be permanently banned without further notice.
  ***If your purchased items have already been consumed and are insufficient to be deducted, you will need to wait until the ban period ends, then submit an appeal through the customer service portal on the login screen, and complete the replenishment process as instructed in order to lift the ban.
  Additionally, we have noticed that some Keepers may be recharging through unofficial channels (such as third-party top-up services). We hereby issue a serious warning: third-party top-up services carry significant risks, including account theft and financial loss. The official platform cannot provide any guarantee for losses caused by unofficial channels. Please recharge through official channels to protect your account and financial security
  Thank you for your support of "Morimens"! If you have any questions, feel free to contact our official customer service for assistance

[UIDs Involved in Anomalous Orders]
